shared_properties: Canvas framing matches the 88x94px idle base.
Core palette remains #535353 with transparent background cutout only.
The ground contact area aligns with the normal stance so the crash pose lands on the same lane.
differences: Eye shape switches to a closed crash mark for the fail state.
Head pitch drops by 4px to read as a collision stop.
The pose is static and never loops.

context.usage: Shown immediately after collision before the restart prompt becomes actionable.

shape.silhouette: Side-profile dinosaur crash pose with lowered head and a rigid tail.

face.eyes: A single closed crash mark replaces the open eye cutout.
face.mouth: One 12px horizontal mouth slit sits below the eye line.

appendages.arms: Two short forearm clusters stay within a 10x8px chest block.
appendages.legs: Two hind legs use silhouette swaps that preserve the ground contact read.
appendages.tail: One thick tail extends 36px from the torso and rises 6px above the baseline at the tip.

specs.texture: Solid monochrome fill with transparent cutout background.

acceptance_criteria: The eye mark clearly differs from the idle and run sheets at 1x scale.
Only #535353 and transparency appear in painted pixels.
